# Supplier Portal — MEOK AI Labs | Procurement + RFP Response

> MEOK supplier portal. For UK procurement teams evaluating MEOK as a supplier. SOC 2 questionnaire, insurance, security, references, RFP response templates.

## Overview
Supplier Portal — MEOK AI Labs | Procurement + RFP Response is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
